title: Parvisedum leiocarpum
taxonomy: Parvisedum leiocarpum belongs to the family Cactaceae. It is a genus of succulent plants. The classification of Parvisedum leiocarpum is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Order: Caryophyllales, Family: Cactaceae, Genus: Parvisedum. Parvisedum leiocarpum is a species within the Parvisedum genus.
